category_sources: source_facts.description says personal AI assistant; official docs describe OpenClaw as an agent with a Gateway for sessions, routing, and channel connections.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub repository use the OpenClaw name; source_facts.homepage is https://openclaw.ai/.
docs_sources: documentation.openclaw.ai redirects to the official docs.openclaw.ai documentation site with quick start, configuration, channels, security, and troubleshooting.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository openclaw/openclaw is linked from OpenClaw install documentation and contains the project source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says personal AI assistant; official docs list CLI, Web Control UI, channel integrations, and Gateway-based agent operation.
